message.content:
Explore the codebase at D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\ to find all existing code related to AI daily report analysis (AI日报分析). Look for:

1. In oa-server (D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\): Controllers, Services, Models, Jobs, routes related to AI daily report, MemPalace, Drawer, Wing, Room, Tunnel, weekly summary, NER extraction, daily report AI analysis
2. In oa-frontend (D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\): Components, pages, store modules related to AI daily report chat/analysis interface
3. In oa-core (D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\): Any related controllers or services

Search for keywords: "ai_daily", "ai_report", "mem_palace", "MemPalace", "drawer", "wing", "room", "tunnel", "weekly_summary", "周摘要", "日报分析", "AiDaily", "AiReport", "DailyAi", "ReportAi", "chat", "llm", "openai", "claude", "gpt"

Be very thorough - check database migrations, config files, routes, and any related test files too. Report back ALL files found with their paths and a brief description of what each does.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough search of the codebase for AI daily report analysis related code. Let me run multiple searches in parallel.

content.text:
I now have a thorough picture of the entire feature. Let me compile the full report.

---

## Complete AI Daily Report Analysis Feature - All Files Found

The feature is spread across all three sub-projects. Here is every file found, organized by role.

---

### oa-server (Business Backend)

#### Controllers

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\app\Http\Controllers\Oa\DailyReportAiController.php`**
The core AI chat controller. Handles: whitelist access check (`checkAccess`, `checkGroupAccess`), AI role CRUD (`roleList/Create/Update/Delete`), common prompt CRUD (`promptList/Create/Delete`), session management (`sessionList`, `sessionMessages`, `contextMore`), message persistence (`saveMessages`), NLU slot extraction for intent recognition (`extractSlots` - uses a large system prompt to identify member + time period from user input), and the streaming ask endpoint (`ask`). Also has blocking/streaming AI connectivity test endpoints (`aiTestBlocking`, `aiTestStream`). Returns `ai_analysis_config` to trigger Vertex AI in oa-core.

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\app\Http\Controllers\Oa\DailyReportAiEmailController.php`**
Handles the "smart daily report email" feature: task CRUD (`taskList/Create/Update/Delete/Toggle`), manual trigger (`taskTrigger`), and prompt testing (`taskTest`). Pulls daily report data, groups it by department or direct manager, marks encrypted content, and returns `decrypt_config` + `ai_analysis_config` for oa-core to decrypt and analyze via AI before sending email.

#### Jobs

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\app\Jobs\Notification\DailyReportAiEmailJob.php`**
The scheduled queue job (runs every minute, triggered by Kernel schedule). Matches enabled email tasks by current time and send cycle (daily/weekly/monthly). For each matching task: pulls subordinates' daily reports, groups by dimension (department or direct manager), and calls `CoreApiLib::sendRequest('master-api/mail/send-decr', $params)` with `ai_analysis_config` containing the user's system prompt. Sleeps 65 seconds between groups to avoid Vertex AI TPM quota exhaustion. Queue: `default`.

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\app\Jobs\AdminRetryDailyReportAiEmail.php`**
An admin-only one-shot artisan command (`retry-daily-report-ai-email`) for manually re-dispatching failed AI email jobs for specific task IDs and group keys, guarded by a forever-cache lock to prevent double execution.

#### Routes / API Config

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\config\sfuser_apis\daily_report_ai.php`**
Defines all 14 sfuser API endpoints for the AI chat feature: check-access, check-group-access, role CRUD (5 endpoints), prompt CRUD (3 endpoints), session list/messages/context-more, save-messages, extract-slots, test-blocking, test-stream, and the streaming ask endpoint.

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\config\sfuser_apis\daily_report_ai_email.php`**
Defines 7 sfuser API endpoints for the email task feature: task list/create/update/delete/toggle/trigger/test.

#### Database Migrations

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\database\migrations\2026_03_24_100000_create_daily_report_ai_tables.php`**
Creates 4 tables:
- `daily_report_ai_roles` (id, sfuser_id, name, system_prompt, timestamps, soft deletes)
- `daily_report_ai_prompts` (id, sfuser_id, content, sort, timestamps)
- `daily_report_ai_sessions` (id, sfuser_id, role_id, title, timestamps, soft deletes)
- `daily_report_ai_messages` (id, session_id, role[user/assistant/context], content as longText, created_at)

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\database\migrations\2026_04_16_100000_create_daily_report_ai_email_tasks_table.php`**
Creates `daily_report_ai_email_tasks` table: id, sfuser_id, name, dimension (department/direct_manager), report_range (today/last_3_days/last_7_days), send_cycle (daily/weekly/monthly), send_time, system_prompt, is_on, timestamps, soft deletes.

#### Scheduler

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\app\Console\Kernel.php`** (line 57)
`$schedule->job(new DailyReportAiEmailJob())->everyMinute();` — fires the email job every minute so it can self-match by send_time.

---

### oa-core (Auth/Transfer Gateway)

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\app\Services\AiAnalysisService.php`**
The actual AI execution engine. Provides:
- `analyze(content, systemPrompt)` — blocking mode, returns complete text
- `analyzeStream(content, systemPrompt, $onChunk, $history)` — streaming mode, calls `$onChunk` per SSE chunk

Both call Vertex AI via its OpenAI-compatible endpoint (`/v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/endpoints/openapi/chat/completions`). Authenticates using GCE Metadata Server access token. Has 4-attempt exponential backoff retry logic for 5xx, 429, and curl errors.

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\app\Services\TransferRequestService.php`**
The middleware that intercepts `ai_analysis_config` from requests. In streaming mode (`response_format=stream` + `ai_analysis_config.system_prompt`): calls oa-server, decrypts response, merges ai_analysis_config from response, strips target field content, sends it to `AiAnalysisService::analyzeStream()`, and emits SSE frames (`type=meta` for metadata, `type=chat` for content chunks, `is_finished=true` at end). In blocking mode: calls `AiAnalysisService::analyze()` and writes result into `output_field` on the response.

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\app\Http\Controllers\MailController.php`** (`sendDecr` method)
Handles the `master-api/mail/send-decr` endpoint called by the email job. Decrypts email content (with `throwEcp(false)` for AI scenarios to tolerate partial permission failures), then calls `AiAnalysisService::analyze()` with the user's system prompt. The AI result replaces the raw report content and is converted from Markdown to HTML before sending as the email body.

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\config\vertex_ai.php`**
Config for the Vertex AI backend:
- `VERTEX_AI_PROJECT_ID` (default: `xinxi-test`)
- `VERTEX_AI_LOCATION` (default: `global`)
- `VERTEX_AI_MODEL` (default: `google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview`)

---

### oa-frontend (Vue 2)

#### API Layer

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\apis\StaffPage\dailyReportAiApis.ts`**
Full TypeScript API module. Exports types (`AiRole`, `AiPrompt`, `AiSession`, `AiMessage`, `ExtractSlotsResult`, `AiEmailTask`, `AskParams`). Functions: `checkAccess`, `checkGroupAccess`, `getRoleList/createRole/updateRole/deleteRole`, `getPromptList/createPrompt/deletePrompt`, `getSessionList/getSessionMessages/getContextMore`, `extractSlots` (calls extract-slots endpoint, parses JSON from `ai_result` field), `saveMessages`, `askAi` (uses `fetch` with `response_format=stream` + `ai_analysis_config` to trigger SSE streaming through oa-core), `getEmailTaskList/createEmailTask/updateEmailTask/deleteEmailTask/toggleEmailTask/triggerEmailTask/testEmailTask`.

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\apis\index.ts`**
Re-exports `dailyReportAiApis` and its types (`ExtractSlotsResult`, `AiEmailTask`).

#### UI Components (all in `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\app\PC\StaffPage\OaDailyReport\OthersReports\`)

**`AiChatPanel.vue`**
The main AI chat panel. A floating action button opens a side panel with: left column (role list with create/edit), middle column (session history), right column (chat messages). Implements the two-phase flow: (1) intent/slot extraction via `extractSlots` to determine who and what period to fetch, (2) fetching report data and calling `askAi` with SSE streaming. Handles `gz:` gzip+base64 compressed report context. Renders markdown in assistant messages.

**`AiRoleModal.vue`**
Dialog for creating/editing an AI role (name + system prompt). Calls `createRole`/`updateRole` APIs.

**`AiPromptPopover.vue`**
Popover dialog showing the user's saved common prompts. Allows adding and deleting prompts, clicking one inserts it into the chat input.

**`AiSyncModal.vue`**
Dialog for manually syncing daily report data into the AI chat context. User selects groups and a date range, then the panel fetches that report data and injects it as a `context`-role message.

**`AiEmailTaskConfig.vue`**
Dialog for managing AI email tasks. Left panel: task list with on/off toggle. Right panel: task config form (name, dimension, report range, send cycle, send day, send time, system prompt). Calls create/update/delete/toggle/trigger email task APIs. Has a "Test Prompt" button that opens `PromptTestDialog`.

**`PromptTestDialog.vue`**
Dialog that calls `testEmailTask` (streaming SSE), shows live streaming output with typing cursor effect and markdown rendering. Has stop/close controls.

**`OthersReports.vue`**
The parent page that mounts `AiChatPanel` (if `hasAiAccess`) and shows the "智能日报邮件" button (if `hasAiEmailAccess`) that opens `AiEmailTaskConfig`.

#### i18n

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\i18n\zh.ts`** (lines ~2966-3023)
All Chinese i18n keys for the feature: `aiRole.*`, `aiPrompt.*`, `aiSync.*`, `aiChat.*` namespaces covering all UI strings.

**`D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\i18n\en.ts`**
Corresponding English translations (same key structure).

---

### Architecture Summary

The data flow is:

1. Frontend (`AiChatPanel`) calls `extractSlots` → oa-core `TransferRequestService` forwards to oa-server `DailyReportAiController::extractSlots`, which builds a system prompt and returns `ai_analysis_config` with `target_field=message, output_field=ai_result` → oa-core calls `AiAnalysisService::analyze()` (blocking Vertex AI) → result written to `ai_result` field → frontend parses the JSON slot result.

2. Frontend calls `askAi` with `response_format=stream` + `ai_analysis_config` → oa-core detects streaming AI path → calls oa-server `ask` endpoint to get `query` + `session_id` → strips the query, feeds it to `AiAnalysisService::analyzeStream()` → SSE chunks streamed back to browser.

3. `DailyReportAiEmailJob` (every-minute cron) → calls `CoreApiLib::sendRequest('master-api/mail/send-decr', ...)` with `ai_analysis_config` → oa-core `MailController::sendDecr` decrypts content → calls `AiAnalysisService::analyze()` (blocking) → AI result converted from Markdown to HTML → sent as email body.

The AI model is **Google Gemini** (configurable via `VERTEX_AI_MODEL`, default `google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview`) accessed through Google Cloud **Vertex AI** using OpenAI-compatible API format with service account authentication via GCE Metadata Server.
